calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stewart Schmidt for Donna Brooks and Michael Brooks. Patricia Berkowitz for Denise Brokks. Robert Links for Joyce Gray (Executor).

The Court stated that it had not received the order granting Denise Brooks' petition. Ms. Berkowitz stated that she had submitted the order. Mr. Schmidt objected to the order. Mr. Links stated that he approved the order as to form, but that he was not aware of the attorney's lien, that there was no dispute as to the distribution of $77,000.00 to Donna Brooks and that there was a lien on Michael's $77,000.00 for child support. Mr. Links submitted an order as to how Michael's share should be disrtibuted. Mr. Schmidt stated that he did not receive notice. Ms. Berkowitz stated that the money should go to the controller's office in Contra Costa as the child support action was in that county and asked for security of future payments. In addition, she stated that she served the petition on Michael, that there was no objection, that there was no problem with the attorney fee lien, but that there was a problem with the money going to Michael. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Aguerre.

Petition For Order For Payment For Money Owed To Michael Lanier Brooks To Be Paid Into The Family Law Court
Off Calendar May-13-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patricia Berkowitz for Denise Brooks. Robert Links for the Executor.

Mr. Links stated that he was neutral as to this part of the case. Ms. Berkowitz informed the Court that the verification of the petitioner was filed on March 14, 2008. The Court granted the petition subject to written order. Ms. Berkowitz is to submit the order.
